texto: Charlotte looked up doubtfully, wondering why, as she got older, she seemed to be more afraid of things, not less.

frase_original: Charlotte looked up doubtfully, wondering why, as she got older, she seemed to be more afraid of things, not less.

texto: And, she thought uncomfortably, what would happen if people did not recognize you? Would you know who you were yourself? If tomorrow they started to call her Vanessa or Janet or Elizabeth, would she know how to be, how to feel like, Charlotte? Were you some particular person only because people recognized you as that?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Penelope Farmer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a tempo. O trecho “And, she thought uncomfortably, what would happen if people did not recognize you? Would you know…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, fantasy, identity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de identity e young-adult.
